title: Personalized
description: Every copy of Minecraft is Personalized
body:
Every copy of Minecraft is personalized

With Personalized, you can see what no one else ever could. With Personalized's UUID randomization, how you see Minecraft is completely unique to you.  

(This mod is fully clientside and includes a configuration file to opt out of any specific features, entity model randomization is off by default, while the rest of features are on by default, with no specific UUID assigned)


Mobs change their models 
Items change with each other 
The creative inventory is jumbled 
And all blocks are switched. 


What awaits in your own Personalized version of Minecraft?

It's also a clientside mod, so you can use it anywhere you want (be careful as some servers might find it ban worthy due to some blocks becoming translucent in your Personalized version)

Save view, but with a different account

 

Personalized includes a configuration file when you can opt out of any feature from the mod, as well as change your UUID to use someone elses.


Personalized is fully compatible with every other mod, allowing you to have very interesting Personalized Versions:

 

If you find an crash, bug, or other issue, make sure to report it in the issues page to me on Discord "kleiders"
